wordplay_note: A name suggesting forest and nature
card_description: Sylvia (Rosen) is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*. Minor character — part of the Rosen Association. Name note: A name suggesting forest and nature. The corporate family behind android manufacture. First appears in *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*.
